ops.body:
Phase 2 turned up guidance references that Phase 5 must update (report-only findings from the top-level CLI lane; plugin/ was off-limits in Phase 2):

1. `workflows install --dir` renamed to `--dest` — stale references: plugin/hooks/approval.py:57 and :218 (auto-approval patterns — the rule must match --dest or approvals silently stop matching), plugin/hooks/README.md:109, plugin/skills/using-cc-notes/references/cli-reference.md:436, plugin/hooks/tests/test_cc_notes.py:459. CHANGELOG.md:42 is historical — leave it.
2. `mount --list/--stop/--shutdown` became `mount list|stop|shutdown` subcommands — mode-flag spellings persist in cli-reference.md and SKILL.md.
3. Sweep ALL plugin hook nudge strings for unconditional CLI wording, not just float_session_tasks/announce_cc_notes_available: observed the native-task-list reminder nudge emitting "cc-notes task add with --criterion" while the MCP server was live (2026-07-14, this session).
